chooseHandle.title: Choose your @handle
chooseHandle.subtitle: This is how people find you and @mention you. Letters and underscores only — pick well, it's permanent.
chooseHandle.invalid: 3–30 letters or underscores, and must include a letter
chooseHandle.rules: Letters a–z and underscores only. No spaces, digits or dots.
chooseHandle.permanentNote: Your handle is permanent and can't be changed later.

chooseHandle.errorTimeout: This is taking too long. Check your connection and try again.

userSearch.noResults: No one found. Try their exact @handle.

welcomeNotification.title: Welcome to Kinlo!

plusActivated.title: You're Kinlo Plus!
plusActivated.subtitle: Unlimited matches unlocked. Go meet your people.

checkout.proNote: Includes Community Matching, AI tools, QR check-in and more.

plusPaywall.subtitle: Keep meeting people with Kinlo Plus — unlimited matches at every event.

proUpsell.title: Activate Community Matching with Kinlo Pro

analytics.title: Matching insights
analytics.note: Only anonymous totals are shown. You never see who liked or matched whom.

consent.lead: Community Matching is opt-in and privacy-first. Here's how it works:
consent.point1Body: Your match profile is shared only with people who attended this event — never public or searchable.
consent.point2Body: Nobody can message you until you both like each other. Your contact details stay private.
consent.point3Title: The host never sees your likes
consent.point3Body: Organizers only see anonymous totals. Who you like is private to you.
consent.point4Body: Report, block or hide anyone, and delete your matching data or leave at any time.
consent.legal: By continuing you agree to the Community Matching terms. You must be 18+. Meeting people carries risks you accept; Kinlo is a neutral platform and doesn't verify identities.

visibility.title: Visibility & safety
visibility.confirmMsg: Your match profile for this event will be deleted. This can't be undone.

peopleYouMet.title: People you met
peopleYouMet.empty: No matches yet. Your next event could change that.

locked.title: Community Matching
locked.subtitle: Enjoy the event and meet people in person. Matching unlocks after it wraps up.
locked.notifySetMsg: We'll notify you the moment matching opens.

grid.title: Who was here

activeRental.title: Your rental
activeRental.tipActive: Enjoy the ride! When you finish, mark it returned and settle any deposit with the host.
activeRental.tipCompleted: Returned. Thanks for riding with us!
activeRental.returnMsg: Confirm the vehicle has been returned. Settle any deposit directly with the host.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.depositHint: Paid directly to the host on pickup — not charged by Kinlo
checkout.disclaimer: The rental agreement, deposit, and any damage or theft are handled directly with the host. Kinlo only facilitates the booking and charges a small service fee.
checkout.vehicleUnavailable: Sorry, this vehicle was just taken.
checkout.hostPayoutsNotReady: This host hasn't finished payout setup yet. Try another vehicle.
checkout.errorMsg: There was a problem processing your rental.

fleet.title: My fleet
fleet.intro: Rent your vehicles directly to riders. You receive the full price you set — Kinlo adds a small service fee for the rider. The deposit and the rental agreement are between you and the rider.
fleet.setUpPayoutsText: Connect your account to get paid for paid rentals. Tap to finish.
fleet.emptyText: Publish your first vehicle to start earning.

This usually means Stripe still needs more information (bank details or identity verification). Complete your Stripe setup to start receiving payouts. Your collected funds are held safely by Stripe until then.
stripeConnect.infoReceive100: • You receive 100% of the ticket price you set
stripeConnect.infoFees: • Platform fee (5%) + processing fee (2.9% + $3 MXN) are added at checkout
stripeConnect.infoAttendeesSeeTotal: • Attendees see the total price before paying
stripeConnect.infoDirectPayments: • Payments go directly to your Stripe account
stripeConnect.verificationNote: Stripe verification typically takes 1-2 business days. You'll be notified when your account is ready.

report.submittedMessage: Thank you for helping keep Kinlo safe. We will review your report.

safetyCenter.footnote: We respond to safety reports within 24 hours.

meetInPublic.title: Meet in public places

keepInfoPrivate.body: Don't share your address or financial details until you feel fully comfortable.

trustInstincts.title: Trust your instincts
trustInstincts.body: If something feels off, leave. Your safety is always the priority.

requestHost.introText: As a host, you'll be able to create unlimited events and build your community. Tell us why you'd be a great host!

requestHost.submissionErrorMessage: Could not submit your request. Please try again.
requestHost.reviewNote: Your application will be reviewed by our team. We'll notify you once a decision has been made.

howToAttend.spotReservedMessage: You're booked with your membership. The host will check you in at the event.
howToAttend.couldNotJoinTryAgain: Could not join. Please try again.
howToAttend.membershipExpired: Your membership expired — renew to use credits
howToAttend.outOfCredits: You're out of credits — top up to keep attending
howToAttend.buyPack: Buy a class pack or pass from this host

aiOptIn.title: Meet Kinlo AI
aiOptIn.subtitle: Finds your people and your events, from your real activity on Kinlo.
aiOptIn.point1: Only you see what it learns
aiOptIn.point3: Turn it off anytime in Settings

members.title: Active members
members.tip: Active members are your recurring revenue and the core of your community. Keep them engaged with updates and new events.

memberships.title: Memberships sold
memberships.tip: Every sale is a commitment. Thank buyers and invite them to their first class to build loyalty.

attended.title: Classes attended
attended.tip: Attendance is engagement. Members who attend renew more — celebrate regulars.

expiring.title: Expiring soon
expiring.tip: These memberships expire within 7 days. A message or renewal offer NOW protects this revenue.

biz_attendance.title: Attendance
biz_attendance.tip: Every check-in in this range. Regulars renew more — celebrate them.

biz_atRisk.title: At-risk members
biz_atRisk.tip: Members you've flagged at risk. A quick message or offer now can win them back.

biz_churned.title: Churned this period
biz_churned.tip: Members marked inactive in this range — your churn. A win-back offer is worth a shot before they're gone for good.

chips.weekend: What can I do this weekend?

askKinlo.title: Ask Kinlo
askKinlo.optInText: Turn on Kinlo AI to plan your social life in one sentence.
askKinlo.emptyText: Ask anything about your week — I only suggest real events from your communities.

aiCoaching.title: AI coaching
aiCoaching.desc: Recommendations to improve your events based on your reviews

advancedInsights.title: Advanced insights
advancedInsights.desc: Trends, sentiment and benchmark vs your category

qrCheckin.title: QR check-in
qrCheckin.desc: Take attendance at the event door

attendeeCrm.title: Attendee CRM
attendeeCrm.desc: History, regulars and alerts on who needs attention

bondvibePro.portalError: Could not open the billing portal.
bondvibePro.heroTitleFree: Take your events to the next level
bondvibePro.heroSubtitlePro: You have access to all Pro features.
bondvibePro.heroSubtitleFree: Tools for hosts who want to grow and retain their community.
bondvibePro.finePrint: Payment is processed securely in your browser. Your Pro access activates automatically once payment completes.

personalityQuiz.successMessage: Your personality profile has been saved. We'll use this to match you with compatible groups.
personalityQuiz.incompleteMessage: Please answer all {{count}} questions before submitting your personality quiz.
personalityQuiz.saveError: Failed to save personality profile. Please try again.
personalityQuiz.helpText: Be honest - there are no right or wrong answers. Your responses help us match you with compatible groups.

questions.q2: I am interested in abstract ideas
questions.q3: I enjoy trying new and foreign foods
questions.q5: I enjoy thinking about philosophical questions
questions.q7: I prefer practical over theoretical discussions
questions.q8: I am curious about many different things
questions.q9: I enjoy exploring new places and cultures
questions.q12: I make plans and stick to them
questions.q13: I often forget to put things back in their proper place
questions.q16: I like to keep things organized
questions.q19: I am the life of the party
questions.q22: I prefer to stay in the background in social situations
questions.q23: I talk to a lot of different people at parties
questions.q24: I need time alone to recharge
questions.q27: I enjoy being the center of attention
questions.q28: I am interested in other people's problems
questions.q31: I am not really interested in others
questions.q32: I make people feel at ease
questions.q35: I am often skeptical of others' intentions
questions.q40: I am relaxed most of the time

personalityResults.successText: We'll use this to match you with compatible groups and events.

OPENNESS.title: Openness to Experience
OPENNESS.description: Appreciation for art, emotion, adventure, unusual ideas, curiosity, and variety of experience.

CONSCIENTIOUSNESS.title: Conscientiousness
CONSCIENTIOUSNESS.description: Tendency to be organized, dependable, and show self-discipline. Aim for achievement against measures or outside expectations.

EXTRAVERSION.title: Extraversion
EXTRAVERSION.description: Energy, positive emotions, assertiveness, sociability and the tendency to seek stimulation in the company of others.

AGREEABLENESS.title: Agreeableness
AGREEABLENESS.description: Tendency to be compassionate and cooperative rather than suspicious and antagonistic towards others.

NEUROTICISM.title: Emotional Stability
NEUROTICISM.description: Tendency to experience unpleasant emotions easily. Those who score high tend to be more emotionally reactive.

personalityResults.infoFooter: Your personality profile is private and only used for matching. You can retake the quiz anytime from your profile settings.

yourWeek.needsPlusText: You've seen this month's free digest. Kinlo Plus delivers it every week.
yourWeek.emptyText: Your digest is taking a break — check back soon.

matchOptIn.title: This event includes Community Matching
matchOptIn.subtitleWithTitle: Meet people from "{{eventTitle}}" with a shared purpose — friends, professional or romantic. It opens when the event ends, so you enjoy it in person first.
matchOptIn.subtitleDefault: Meet people from this event with a shared purpose — friends, professional or romantic. It opens when the event ends, so you enjoy it in person first.

avatarPicker.photoHint: Your photo will be cropped to a circle. Until you add one, we'll show your initial.

connectSpotifyButton.importFailed: We couldn't import your music right now. Please try again.

eventCreatedModal.recurringMessage: Your recurring event "{{eventTitle}}" has been created successfully!
eventCreatedModal.recurringInfo: Each event is independent - attendees join individually per date.
eventCreatedModal.singleInfo: People can now discover and join your event.

matchingEntryCard.addSubtitle: Let attendees connect after the event.
matchingEntryCard.openSubtitle: See who was here and connect.

placeAutocomplete.hint: Type the venue name and address, then tap “Use this”.

ratingModal.commentPlaceholder: What did you enjoy about this event?

socialAuthButtons.appleUnavailableMessage: Sign in with Apple often fails on the iOS Simulator. Please try on a real device.

draftWithAI.usedFreeDraft: You've used your free AI draft. Kinlo Pro drafts every event for you.
draftWithAI.describeIdea: Describe the event in one line — I'll draft the rest from your history.
draftWithAI.draftingFailed: AI drafting is taking a break — try again in a moment.

matchIntelCard.unlockIcebreakers: Unlock 3 AI icebreakers written for you two

memberPulseCard.valueLine: AI reads your community's pulse and drafts win-backs for cooling-off members.
memberPulseCard.forCoolingOffMembers_one: For {{count}} cooling-off member · long-press to copy · send it from Groups
memberPulseCard.forCoolingOffMembers_other: For {{count}} cooling-off members · long-press to copy · send it from Groups
memberPulseCard.privacyNote: Aggregated & privacy-safe · AI never sees individual DMs

monthReadCard.unlockNextSteps: Unlock "what to do next" — ranked actions from your numbers

carpoolCard.cancelRideMsg: Riders will lose their seats and be notified.
carpoolCard.removedFromRide: The driver removed you from this ride.
carpoolCard.hasHelped_one: Has helped {{count}} person get to events
carpoolCard.hasHelped_other: Has helped {{count}} people get to events

manageRow.title: Kinlo for Business
manageRow.subtitle: Members, packages, finance — run it all

business.ownerStripeIncomplete: The business owner hasn't finished their Stripe payout setup yet, so this can't be charged. Please ask them to complete it.

hub.title: Kinlo for Business
hub.setupText: Run your whole operation from your phone — members, packages, attendance and finance. Works fully by hand, even for clients who don't use the app.
hub.checkInSubtitle: Scan a member's pass to mark present
hub.moreSoon: More arrives as we roll it out.

setup.title: New business
setup.intro: Pick what best describes your business — it only tweaks a few labels and suggestions. You can change it later.
setup.presetHint: A preset only swaps labels and defaults — never your data.
setup.nameRequiredMsg: Give your business a name to continue.

pricingTier.title: Pricing tier
pricingTier.memberHint: Locals pay your special price. Set Local & General prices when you create an event or class — {{name}} is auto-charged the Local rate at checkout.

members.title: Members
members.emptyText: Add your first member by hand — no app account needed. App signups and QR check-ins link to the same records later.

form.name: Name
form.dobHint: We show day & month only — never the year or age.
form.smsConsentSub: The member agrees to receive class and account texts. Off by default; they can opt out anytime (STOP). See the Privacy Notice.
form.autoLinkNote: Links automatically if they later join Kinlo.

record.title: Member
record.creditsEmpty: Packages and credits arrive with the next block.
record.attendanceEmpty: Attendance shows up once check-in is enabled.
record.deleteMsg: This permanently removes the member and their record.

guestCode.title: Guest code
guestCode.hint: Share this so the member links their Kinlo account and unlocks their QR check-in pass.
guestCode.shareMessage: {{business}} on Kinlo: enter code {{code}} to link your account and unlock your check-in pass.

csv.title: Import CSV
csv.intro: Paste your member list (with a header row). Map the columns, then import. We never assume SMS consent from a list.
csv.consentNote: Imported members have SMS off unless you map an SMS-consent column with a truthy value (yes / sí / 1 / x).
csv.emptyMsg: Paste a CSV with a header row and at least one member.
csv.nameRequiredMsg: Choose which column holds the member's name.

packages.title: Packages
packages.emptyText: Create a class pack, a pass, or a drop-in. Assign it to members and credits deduct on check-in.

packageForm.name: Name
packageForm.audienceHint: Local-only packages can only be assigned to Local members; General-only to General members.
packageForm.deleteMsg: Existing members keep their current credits.
packageForm.creditsRequiredMsg: Set how many events/classes this package includes (at least 1).
packageForm.validityRequiredMsg: Set how many days the package is valid for.

credits.noPackages: No packages yet. Create one first.
credits.audienceMismatchMsg: This package's audience doesn't match the member's pricing tier.

attendance.noCreditMsg: Attendance recorded, but this member's package is out of credits or expired. Renew it or record a payment.

checkin.wrongBusiness: That pass is for another business.
checkin.notAPass: That isn't a Kinlo business pass.
checkin.permText: To scan your members' passes and check them in.
checkin.hint: Point at the member's pass QR

pass.hint: Show this to the host to get checked in.

redeem.title: Link a business
redeem.intro: Enter the code your host gave you. It links this account to their business and unlocks your check-in pass.
redeem.inUse: That code is already in use.
redeem.failed: Couldn't link right now. Please try again.
redeem.entrySub: Link a code from your studio, gym or host

request.title: Request a session
request.hint: This sends a request. The host confirms the final time, and a credit or payment is only applied once they accept.
request.sentText: The host will confirm your session soon. You'll get a notification.
request.noTypes: This business isn't taking session requests yet.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.scopeNote: Ranged analytics below cover the whole business.
dashboard.noAttendance: No attendance in this range yet.
dashboard.aiOff: Turn on Kinlo AI in Settings for an AI read of your numbers.
dashboard.bestDayNote: {{day}} is your busiest — put your best classes there.
dashboard.pricingMixNote: Based on each member's checkout price tier — a pricing split, not residency.
dashboard.flowNote: Churn & recovered come from status changes; retention = last period's active members who returned.
dashboard.flowBuilding: Retention = last period's active members who returned. Churn & recovered start counting as members change status.

birthdays.title: Birthdays
birthdays.bannerSub: A quick note (or a gift) keeps them coming back.
birthdays.whyGeneric: No interests on file yet — a popular pack is a safe bet.
birthdays.sendWishHow: How do you want to reach {{name}}?
birthdays.wishMessage: Happy birthday, {{name}}! 🎉 Wishing you a wonderful day from all of us.
birthdays.emptyText: Add a birthday on a member's profile and they'll show up here on the day.
birthdays.privacyNote: We show day & month only — never the year or age.

momentum.title: Member health status
momentum.reminderHint: Sends to the assignee once Automations is on.
momentum.dragHint: Drag onto a column to move
momentum.emptyText: Add members who need attention, or auto-fill from your at-risk and inactive members.
momentum.populatedNone: No new at-risk members to add.
momentum.aiProMsg: AI suggestions are part of Kinlo Pro.
momentum.aiOffMsg: Turn on Kinlo AI in Settings to draft actions.
momentum.minColumnMsg: A board needs at least one named column.
momentum.deleteMsg: This removes the card from the board.

finance.title: Finance
finance.noPayments: No payments in this range yet.

payment.title: Record payment
payment.amountRequiredMsg: The payment amount must be greater than zero.
payment.savedMsg: Share a receipt with the member?

expense.title: Record expense
expense.amountRequiredMsg: The expense amount must be greater than zero.
expense.savedMsg: It's now in your P&L for the range.
expense.noExpenses: No expenses in this range yet.

classes.title: Classes
classes.emptyText: Add your weekly schedule — instructors, times and capacity. Members book in, and you take attendance from the roster.

classForm.name: Name
classForm.publicHint: Show it in Kinlo discovery to bring in new customers.
classForm.discoveryHint: The next session is listed as an event people can find and join. Turning this off removes the listing.
classForm.cityRequiredMsg: Pick a city so people can find this class in discovery.
classForm.deleteMsg: This removes the class and its roster.
classForm.whenRequiredMsg: Choose one or more weekdays, or a one-off date.

roster.waitlistedMsg: {{name}} is on the waitlist — the class is full.
roster.alreadyMsg: This member is already in the class.

sessionType.title: Session types
sessionType.empty: No session types yet. Create 1:1, couples or group sessions.
sessionType.capacityHint: Max = people per session (1 = 1:1, 2 = couple, 3+ = group).

session.title: Session
session.noAppMsg: This member hasn't linked a Kinlo account yet.

automations.title: Automatic notifications
automations.emptyText: Set a trigger and a message once — Kinlo sends it automatically to each member across push, in-app, SMS or email.
automations.channelHint: Push and in-app send now. SMS (Twilio) and email activate once credentials are configured.
automations.activeHint: Runs automatically on schedule when on.
automations.sendNowMsg: Send this message to the audience across the allowed channels.

branches.title: Branches
branches.empty: One location so far. Add branches to run several under one business — the dashboard rolls up across them.

staff.title: Staff
staff.hint: Invite staff by their Kinlo email and give them a role. Reception can't see finance.

transfer.entrySub: Hand the business to a validated host (Kinlo approval required)
transfer.sheetHint: Search a validated host to receive ownership
transfer.requestedMsg: Transfer to {{name}} is pending Kinlo approval. Nothing changes until it's approved.
transfer.notHost: That person isn't a validated host yet.
transfer.alreadyPending: A transfer is already pending for this business.

staff.invitedMsg: {{name}} has been invited. They gain access once they accept.
staff.pendingMsg: {{email}} doesn't have a Kinlo account yet. They'll be invited automatically when they join.
staff.notFound: No Kinlo account with that email.

roleHint.instructor: Manage members, classes and attendance. No finance.
roleHint.reception: Check-in and attendance only. No finance.

roles.title: Roles & permissions
roles.entrySub: Rename roles, set what each can access
roles.hint: Each role controls which Business areas its staff can open. Owner has everything and can't be edited.
